__faion_header__.purpose: minimum viable filled artefact for smoke fixture

criteria.body: Given a logged-in patient When they pick a slot Then a confirmation SMS is sent
Given a slot becomes unavailable mid-flow When the patient submits Then the system offers next 3 slots
Given an invalid insurance When booking Then the system surfaces 'insurance required' error
p95 latency for booking endpoint < 500ms under 50 rps sustained load
